name: system-design-playground
description: System Design Playground AI — Developer Edition

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.audit:all: npm audit --prefix backend && npm audit --prefix frontend
